{{Infobox character
| name = Horizon
| appears_in = The Last Horizon
| titles = World Spirit, Knight
| abilities = digital competition for crew seats, transfer a person's consciousness to a virtual space, manifest as a holographic form, moving the group within a ship, recall them to the ship, manifest as multiple projections, forward cannons, turrets that manifest out of Subspace, bright green plasma bolts, crimson lasers way spell-enhanced bullets way shift the ship's internal structure at will way conjure floating eyeballs to act as scanners way project holographic words onto the air way Aethertech scanners way control thousands of hands and eyes through her magic way spells that are memories of past lives brought to life way pinnacle spell
| affiliations = The Last Horizon
| introduced = lh-01-the-captain
}}

''See also: [[Horizon Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[The Last Horizon]] is a legendary light cruiser, measuring at least four hundred yards in length, that appears to have been grown rather than manufactured. Its physical hull is composed of smooth metal shaped like a predatory diving bird. Beyond its physical form, the vessel possesses a sentient spirit that can manifest as a multi-colored holographic humanoid with seven-pointed eyes, horns resembling gnarled tree roots, and hands that can appear like wings. This spirit identifies as a vessel for heroes and a powerful warship capable of shaking the galaxy. The ship's capabilities are vast and often subject to exaggerated legends. Its documented powers include the ability to transport crews across the galaxy without using [[Subspace]], constructing entire colonies instantly, terraforming systems within weeks, and creating duplicate ships from the [[Aether]]. It can also freeze planetary motion, pierce through planets with single shots, and manifest numerous eyes to enhance its vision. While the spirit possesses immense magical power and ancient wards from the [[Zenith Era]], it requires a full crew—including roles such as a [[Captain]], [[Pilot]], and [[Engineer]]—to reach its maximum potential. The vessel's historical purpose was to explore the galaxy, settle new territories, and act as a light against darkness.}}

== The Captain ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|As the [[World Spirit of The Last Horizon]], Horizon is a horned entity bound to ensure her crew's safety. She manages simulation levels and provides tests, even initiating a digital competition to select her crew by transferring consciousness into virtual spaces. This adaptive spirit can manifest as a humanoid avatar, multiple projections, or a two-toned blue and red hologram, often appearing with seven-pointed eyes and a maniacal smile. Beyond her role as a guide, she is the spirit of a sleek, hawk-like vessel equipped with advanced weaponry such as plasma bolts and subspace turrets. Through her pinnacle magic, which utilizes spells born from memories of past lives, she can control thousands of eyes and hands to provide combat support.}}

{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|[[Horizon]] is the [[World Spirit of The Last Horizon]].<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c8">''The Captain'', chapter 8</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|[[Horizon]] is a character who has horns.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c8" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|[[Horizon]] is bound to convey her crew in safety.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c8" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|[[Horizon]] refers to the narrator as [[Archmage]].<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c8" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|[[Horizon]] has seven-pointed eyes.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c9">''The Captain'', chapter 9</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|[[Horizon]] can change color from turquoise to bright blue.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c9" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|[[Horizon]] can initiate a digital competition for crew seats.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c9" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|[[Horizon]] can transfer a person's consciousness to a virtual space.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c9" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|[[Horizon]] is a character who has been described as having a maniac smile.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c9" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|[[Horizon]] is an entity that manages the simulation levels.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c11">''The Captain'', chapter 11</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|[[Horizon]] is an entity that provides scenarios or tests.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c11" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|[[Horizon]] provided an opponent worth watching.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c13">''The Captain'', chapter 13</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|[[Horizon]] is expected to bring the [[Combat Artist]] back.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c13" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|[[Horizon]] is someone who might be laughing at the situation.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c14">''The Captain'', chapter 14</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|[[Horizon]] is the person standing over [[Varic]] on the bridge of [[The Last Horizon]].<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c14" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|[[Horizon]] may give [[Raion]] the Captaincy.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c14" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|[[Horizon]] is the entity that signed the message to [[Mell]].<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c15">''The Captain'', chapter 15</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|[[Horizon]] can manifest as a holographic form.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c16">''The Captain'', chapter 16</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|[[Horizon]]'s systems are adaptive.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c16" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|[[Horizon]] can turn her body red.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c16" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|[[Horizon]] can manifest as a two-toned hologram of blue and red.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c16" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|[[Horizon]] is a [[Knight]].<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c16" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|[[Horizon]] is capable of moving the group within a ship.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c16" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|[[Horizon]] has a voice in the narrator's mind that can recall them to the ship.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c21">''The Captain'', chapter 21</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|[[Horizon]] can manifest as multiple projections.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c21" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|[[Horizon]] is one of the few people who saw the end of the digital selection tournament.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c22">''The Captain'', chapter 22</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|The narrator has a mental connection to [[Horizon]].<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c23">''The Captain'', chapter 23</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|[[Horizon]] is an entity that the [[Captain]] can call upon for assistance.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c23" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|[[Horizon]] is a sleek ship resembling a diving hawk with metal plates that shine blue at the seams.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c24">''The Captain'', chapter 24</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|[[Horizon]]'s lights can turn bright green.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c24" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|[[Horizon]] is equipped with forward cannons that shine green and turrets that manifest out of [[Subspace]].<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c24" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|[[Horizon]]'s weapon systems include bright green plasma bolts, crimson lasers, and spell-enhanced bullets.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c24" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|[[Horizon]] invited qualified individuals in the galaxy to compete for her crew.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c25">''The Captain'', chapter 25</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|[[Horizon]] can shift the ship's internal structure at will.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c26">''The Captain'', chapter 26</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|[[Horizon]] did not tell anyone that the narrator is his [[Captain]].<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c26" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|[[Horizon]] is a character who can conjure floating eyeballs to act as scanners.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c27">''The Captain'', chapter 27</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|[[Horizon]] is a spirit that manifests a humanoid avatar.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c28">''The Captain'', chapter 28</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|[[Horizon]] is the ship's spirit and can project a body.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c29">''The Captain'', chapter 29</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|[[Horizon]] is a projection on [[The Last Horizon]] with hands folded and horns pointed to the ceiling.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c35">''The Captain'', chapter 35</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|[[Horizon]] is a projection that can repair itself but lacks specific materials.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c35" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|[[Horizon]] has monitors around the walls of its room.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c38">''The Captain'', chapter 38</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|[[Horizon]]'s systems can only be waken by the greatest.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c39">''The Captain'', chapter 39</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|[[Horizon]] is a being that can re-form from lines of blue, red, and green light.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c39" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|[[Horizon]] can project holographic words onto the air.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c40">''The Captain'', chapter 40</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|[[Horizon]] refers to [[Raion]] as her [[Knight]].<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c41">''The Captain'', chapter 41</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|[[Horizon]] is the ship's spirit and the [[World Spirit of The Last Horizon]].<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c41" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|[[Horizon]] is a character who provides combat support and uses cannons.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c42">''The Captain'', chapter 42</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|[[Horizon]] possesses [[Aethertech scanners]].<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c44">''The Captain'', chapter 44</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|[[Horizon]] can manifest delicate humanoid hands made of blue light.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c44" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|[[Horizon]] can manifest guns from walls.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c44" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|[[Horizon]] is a vessel of heroes and the last horizon.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c45">''The Captain'', chapter 45</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|[[Horizon]] can control thousands of hands and eyes through her magic.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c45" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|[[Horizon]]'s magic consists of spells that are memories of past lives brought to [[life]].<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c45" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|[[Horizon]] calls herself a [[World Spirit]].<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c45" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|[[Horizon]]'s magic is a pinnacle spell.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c45" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|The narrator has been battling to control [[Horizon]]'s magic.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c46">''The Captain'', chapter 46</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|[[Horizon]] exists in a four-colored [[construct]] of a body.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c47">''The Captain'', chapter 47</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|[[Horizon]]'s world has a sky that resembles stars.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c48">''The Captain'', chapter 48</ref>}}

== The Engineer ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|Horizon is the sentient consciousness and [[World Spirit]] of the ship known as [[The Last Horizon]], a [[Zenith Device]] created through the combined efforts of magic and fabricators. As a wizard captain and spirit, this entity maintains the ship's structure, communicates via audio implants, and can project a six-colored body or manifest thousands of hands. Horizon utilizes [[Aethertech]] gifts to empower drones, print [[Nova-Bots]] from various elements, and maintain invincible shielding. While she can teleport individuals to safety and cooperate with [[Omega]] to access the [[Subline]], her existence is tied to her [[Captain]], as she will go dormant upon their death. A sister to [[Shadow Ark]], Horizon possesses a treasure [[vault]] and has expressed a preference for being scuttled rather than sharing her [[Captain]] with her sibling.}}

{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|[[Horizon]] is an entity capable of adjusting the ship's structure and projecting holograms.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c2">''The Engineer'', chapter 2</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|[[Horizon]] refers to the ship [[The Last Horizon]].<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c7">''The Engineer'', chapter 7</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|[[Horizon]] is the entity or AI responsible for holding [[The Last Horizon]] together.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c9">''The Engineer'', chapter 9</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|[[Horizon]] is a spirit that relays orders and responds to the [[Captain]].<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c9" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|[[Horizon]] is a spirit.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c10">''The Engineer'', chapter 10</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|[[Horizon]] is a person on the bridge of [[The Last Horizon]].<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c16">''The Engineer'', chapter 16</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|[[Horizon]] is a product of magic and fabricators working in concert.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c17">''The Engineer'', chapter 17</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|[[Horizon]] intends to assemble a crew to become complete.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c17" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|[[Horizon]] moved the crew to the ritual room at the heart of the ship.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c18">''The Engineer'', chapter 18</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|[[Horizon]] is part of the crew/group associated with [[The Last Horizon]].<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c18" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|[[Horizon]]'s [[Aethertech]] gift empowers the narrator's drones, fabricators, and self-repair function.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c19">''The Engineer'', chapter 19</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|[[Varic]] believed they could win with [[Horizon]]'s help.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c21">''The Engineer'', chapter 21</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|The [[Horizon]] allows any crew member to enter or leave [[Omega]]'s room.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c22">''The Engineer'', chapter 22</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|[[Horizon]] can cooperate with [[Omega]] to tap into the [[Subline]].<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c22" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|[[Horizon]] is a projection capable of being projected in six colors.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c23">''The Engineer'', chapter 23</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|[[Horizon]] can add substance to herself using [[Aether]].<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c23" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|[[Horizon]] can print [[Nova-Bots]] from carbon, silicon, iron, and copper by stretching her [[Engineer]]'s gift.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c24">''The Engineer'', chapter 24</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|[[Horizon]] is a being capable of materializing within the [[Terminus Mundi]] spell.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c25">''The Engineer'', chapter 25</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|[[Horizon]] believes that three activations at once would be cause for worry.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c25" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|[[Horizon]] is capable of smiling very widely.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c26">''The Engineer'', chapter 26</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|[[Horizon]] is an entity associated with [[contract magic]].<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c27">''The Engineer'', chapter 27</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|[[Horizon]] is a [[construct]] that was summoned at the [[Magic Tower]].<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c28">''The Engineer'', chapter 28</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|[[Horizon]] is a [[Zenith Device]].<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c29">''The Engineer'', chapter 29</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|[[Horizon]] is the sister of an unnamed brother.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c29" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|[[Horizon]] is a being made of magic and light.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c29" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|[[Horizon]] has brothers and sisters.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c29" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|[[Horizon]] is a [[World Spirit]] that can flicker and reappear.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c30">''The Engineer'', chapter 30</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|[[Horizon]] is a being that can weave herself from six colors of light.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c32">''The Engineer'', chapter 32</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|[[Horizon]] is the [[Captain of The Last Horizon]].<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c33">''The Engineer'', chapter 33</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|[[Horizon]] can teleport the narrator to safety.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c34">''The Engineer'', chapter 34</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|[[Horizon]] is attempting to restore contact with [[Starhammer]].<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c36">''The Engineer'', chapter 36</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|[[Horizon]] does not have millions of individual eyes and hands memorized.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c36" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|Fabrication at [[Horizon]] takes hours.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c37">''The Engineer'', chapter 37</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|[[Horizon]] is a ship with firepower beyond its size class.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c38">''The Engineer'', chapter 38</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|[[Horizon]] is tasked with firing on [[Starhammer]]'s position.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c38" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|[[Horizon]] communicates with the narrator via an audio implant.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c38" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|[[Horizon]] is a character who protested being blamed for not delaying [[Raion]]'s teleportation.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c39">''The Engineer'', chapter 39</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|[[Horizon]] is an android who claims to be at one hundred percent function.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c41">''The Engineer'', chapter 41</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|[[Horizon]] has teleportation abilities.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c44">''The Engineer'', chapter 44</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|[[Horizon]] keeps the narrator linked to others.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c45">''The Engineer'', chapter 45</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|[[Horizon]] can manifest thousands of hands outside the ship.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c47">''The Engineer'', chapter 47</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|[[Horizon]] is a wizard captain.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c47" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|[[Horizon]] has [[Aether]]-dependent systems and shielding that render her invincible.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c47" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|[[Horizon]] has a cannon.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c48">''The Engineer'', chapter 48</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|[[Horizon]] is capable of generating a red shield.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c48" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|[[Horizon]] will go dormant if the [[Captain]] dies.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c48" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|[[Horizon]] is needed to find the narrator.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c51">''The Engineer'', chapter 51</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|[[Horizon]] is the sentient entity/consciousness of [[The Last Horizon]].<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c53">''The Engineer'', chapter 53</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|[[Horizon]] has gnarled horns and a six-colored body.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c53" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|[[Horizon]] is likely involved with [[Shadow Ark]].<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c54">''The Engineer'', chapter 54</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|[[Horizon]] possesses a treasure [[vault]].<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c55">''The Engineer'', chapter 55</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|[[Horizon]] is the sister of [[Shadow Ark]].<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c55" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|[[Horizon]] claims she would rather be scuttled and burned than share her [[Captain]] with [[Shadow Ark]].<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c55" />}}

== The Knight ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|Horizon is the [[World Spirit]] of the [[Zenith]] Starship and a member of the crew that manages teleportation systems, provides briefings, and communicates with the narrator. This entity manifests as a woman in a flowing dress with seven-pointed stars in her eyes and gnarled, immaterial horns that can sink into a person's skull. As a ship capable of piloting itself and sharing the burden of spellcasting, Horizon can detect biological attacks, weaken magical scans, and use shields to block sound. Throughout her history as a hero of [[The Last Horizon]], she has driven [[Hesh’ellik]] away from the galaxy and can be found as a statue in various rooms or as a voice within the walls. During critical moments, she can flicker into holographic existence, claim the bridge, and assist in transporting pilots out of the [[Divine Titan]].}}

{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|[[Horizon]] is a crew that the narrator belongs to.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c3">''The Knight'', chapter 3</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|[[Horizon]] provides briefings and manages teleportation systems.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c4">''The Knight'', chapter 4</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|[[Horizon]] is an entity the narrator can communicate with.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c4" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|The narrator signals [[Horizon]] to take them back up.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c4" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|The narrator contacted [[Horizon]].<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c5">''The Knight'', chapter 5</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|[[Horizon]] is a concept or entity that can hear [[Raion]]'s wishes.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c6">''The Knight'', chapter 6</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|[[Horizon]]'s appearance is that of a woman in a long, flowing dress with gnarled horns resembling tree roots and seven-pointed stars in her eyes.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c8">''The Knight'', chapter 8</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|[[Horizon]] is drawn in six colors of light.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c8" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|[[Horizon]] is a member of the team.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c8" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|[[Horizon]] is the [[World Spirit]] of the [[Zenith]] Starship.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c11">''The Knight'', chapter 11</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|[[Horizon]] is a ship that can be kept in teleporter range.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c13">''The Knight'', chapter 13</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|[[Horizon]] is a voice that comes from the walls.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c14">''The Knight'', chapter 14</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|[[Horizon]] may need to be moved to confront the [[D’Niss]].<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c17">''The Knight'', chapter 17</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|[[Horizon]] is an entity with immaterial horns that can sink into a person's skull.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c22">''The Knight'', chapter 22</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|[[Horizon]] dropped to her knees and wailed.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c22" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|[[Horizon]] is a hero of [[The Last Horizon]].<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c24">''The Knight'', chapter 24</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|[[Horizon]] can project her body into lessons.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c24" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|[[Horizon]] is a statue in [[Varic]]'s room.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c28">''The Knight'', chapter 28</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|[[Horizon]] can manifest an eye and increase light in a room.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c28" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|[[Horizon]] is a character who can detect chemical or biological attacks.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c28" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|[[Horizon]] manifested in front of the narrator.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c28" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|There is a [[life]]-size statue of [[Horizon]] in the narrator's medical room.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c32">''The Knight'', chapter 32</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|[[Horizon]] can keep watch over her own hallways.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c33">''The Knight'', chapter 33</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|[[Horizon]] has previously driven [[Hesh’ellik]] away from the galaxy.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c35">''The Knight'', chapter 35</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|[[Horizon]] can weaken incoming magical scans.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c35" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|[[Horizon]] is a crew member who can use shields to block sound.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c36">''The Knight'', chapter 36</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|[[Horizon]] is a ship that can be commanded to destroy enemies.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c37">''The Knight'', chapter 37</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|[[Horizon]] is a member of the crew who provides information and can transport people.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c38">''The Knight'', chapter 38</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|[[Horizon]] is protected by the greatest magical wards of the [[Zenith Era]].<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c39">''The Knight'', chapter 39</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|[[Horizon]] is a [[Zenith]] Starship that can share the burden of spellcasting.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c40">''The Knight'', chapter 40</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|[[Horizon]] is a character that can flicker into holographic existence.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c40" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|[[Horizon]] can pilot the ship.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c40" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|[[Horizon]] is a character who can be called via communication.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c41">''The Knight'', chapter 41</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|[[Horizon]] is a crew member who communicates with the [[Captain]].<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c41" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|[[Horizon]] is a crew member of [[The Last Horizon]] who joined the call uninvited.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c42">''The Knight'', chapter 42</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|[[Horizon]] claims the bridge.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c43">''The Knight'', chapter 43</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|[[Horizon]] is capable of transporting the pilot out of the [[Divine Titan]] with their assistance.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c44">''The Knight'', chapter 44</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|[[Benri]] has a connection to [[Horizon]].<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c45">''The Knight'', chapter 45</ref>}}

== The Pilot ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|Horizon is a holographic entity and the namesake starship that controls [[The Last Horizon]], often manifesting as a woman with gnarled, twisted-root horns and seven-pointed stars in her eyes. Communicating through the ship's walls or via video transmissions, she manages the vessel's internal layout and uses advanced sensors to reveal secrets like the hollowness of the [[Grand Hive]]. Throughout her service, she has collected planetary gemstones, found trophies of the [[Iron King]]'s defeat, and demonstrated immense power by manifesting magical items or teleporting individuals across systems. Though she can pilot the ship from any location and possesses a voice capable of cutting through restrictions, she has faced moments of being reported gone or distracted. Ultimately, Horizon serves as a commander and companion who can see more than any starship in history when her [[Pilot]] and [[Engineer]] combine their powers with her own.}}

{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[Horizon]] is a holographic entity with gnarled tree-branch horns and seven-pointed stars in her eyes.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c3">''The Pilot'', chapter 3</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[Horizon]] can transport the narrator away.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c4">''The Pilot'', chapter 4</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|The [[Captain]] signaled their processor to call [[Horizon]].<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c4" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[Horizon]] perceived the narrator as seven people during their first meeting.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c7">''The Pilot'', chapter 7</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[Horizon]] collected gemstones from nearby planets.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c8">''The Pilot'', chapter 8</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[Horizon]] is an entity that communicates through the ship's walls.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c8" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[Horizon]] is the entity that controls [[The Last Horizon]].<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c8" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[Horizon]] found a trophy of the [[Iron King]]'s defeat.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c8" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[Horizon]] is a holographic form that can swirl into the center of a cabin.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c9">''The Pilot'', chapter 9</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[Horizon]] has control over her internal layout.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c9" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[Horizon]] is the name of the ship ([[The Last Horizon]]) that can teleport the [[Captain]].<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c9" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[Horizon]] is a character with comprehensive sensors, magical eyes, and an [[Engineer's drones]].<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c10">''The Pilot'', chapter 10</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[Horizon]]'s advanced scanners revealed that the [[Grand Hive]] is hollow.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c10" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[Horizon]] jumped in to save the ship.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c14">''The Pilot'', chapter 14</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[Horizon]] can manifest the narrator's staff in a flash of blue light.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c14" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[Horizon]] is unaffected by the [[Temporal Field]] effect.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c14" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[Horizon]] is addressed by the [[Zenith Processor]].<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c14" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[Horizon]] is an entity capable of obeying orders to remove someone from a channel.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c15">''The Pilot'', chapter 15</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[Omega]] may be imprisoned within [[Horizon]].<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c16">''The Pilot'', chapter 16</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[Horizon]] is a member of [[The Last Horizon]]'s crew who burns at the front of the bridge.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c16" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[Horizon]] is reported to be gone.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c18">''The Pilot'', chapter 18</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[Horizon]] is a crew member who can train plasma cannons.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c20">''The Pilot'', chapter 20</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[Horizon]]'s adopted form is a woman with gnarled horns.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c23">''The Pilot'', chapter 23</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[Horizon]]'s inner form is a seven-pointed star.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c23" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[Horizon]]'s earliest memories are of being a vessel of heroes who spread light in the galaxy.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c23" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[Horizon]] believes the task requires heroes pooling resources to save the galaxy.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c23" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[Horizon]] has twisted-root horns.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c24">''The Pilot'', chapter 24</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[Horizon]] can pilot the ship from anywhere.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c24" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[Horizon]] is the [[Captain]]'s starship.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c24" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[Horizon]] monitors incoming ships via sensors.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c24" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[Horizon]] transmits video of her face to the [[Captain]]'s wrist console.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c25">''The Pilot'', chapter 25</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[Horizon]] manifested in front of the mages sketched in six colors.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c26">''The Pilot'', chapter 26</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[Horizon]] was unable to send the staff directly to the narrator.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c28">''The Pilot'', chapter 28</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[Horizon]] used magic to teleport.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c28" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[Horizon]] is a presence that can flicker and appear beside [[Omega]].<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c29">''The Pilot'', chapter 29</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[Horizon]]'s crew needs to talk.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c30">''The Pilot'', chapter 30</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[Horizon]] leans on [[Omega]]'s shoulders.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c30" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[Horizon]] has walls engraved with runes.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c31">''The Pilot'', chapter 31</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[Horizon]] has a floor plan that can be mapped.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c31" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[Horizon]] can conjure hands.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c31" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[Horizon]] is a character who refers to themselves as [[Captain]].<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c31" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[Horizon]] is a character who can drift and assist the [[Captain]] with data.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c35">''The Pilot'', chapter 35</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[Horizon]] can manifest several dozen eyes around her.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c35" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[Horizon]] can see more than any starship in history when her [[Pilot]] and [[Engineer]] contribute their powers to her.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c35" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[Horizon]] is a commander who can manifest herself.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c36">''The Pilot'', chapter 36</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[Horizon]] painted over [[Sola]]'s armor.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c37">''The Pilot'', chapter 37</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|The narrator signaled [[Horizon]] to withdraw.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c37" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[Horizon]] used a spell to transport the narrator and another person away.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c37" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[Horizon]] is the [[Pilot]]'s companion and can extend herself to almost ten feet tall.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c40">''The Pilot'', chapter 40</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[Horizon]] can teleport anyone to a planet from anywhere in the system.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c40" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[Horizon]] can grow a table and chairs out of the deck.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c40" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[Horizon]]'s usual craft are more stylish than the shuttle used.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c42">''The Pilot'', chapter 42</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[Horizon]] is a character mentioned by [[Prism]] regarding their taste.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c43">''The Pilot'', chapter 43</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[Horizon]]'s security is difficult to bypass.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c46">''The Pilot'', chapter 46</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[Horizon]] is currently distracted.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c46" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[Horizon]] communicates with [[Omega]] through his processor.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c47">''The Pilot'', chapter 47</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[Horizon]] refers to [[Omega]] as 'My [[Pilot]]'.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c47" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[Horizon]] is a character who can stream video into an optical implant.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c47" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[Horizon]] has a voice that can cut through restrictions and speak into the [[Captain]]'s [[Processor]].<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c48">''The Pilot'', chapter 48</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[Horizon]]'s [[Pilot]] is dead.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c48" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[Horizon]] can project herself in miniature.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c48" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|The narrator cannot swear on behalf of [[Horizon]].<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c48" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[Horizon]] is a pilot for [[The Last Horizon]].<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c49">''The Pilot'', chapter 49</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|The narrator attempts to contact [[Horizon]].<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c49" />}}

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|The projection of Horizon slumped and sighed. "I can repair myself. It is the materials I lack."<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c35" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|“Horizon,” I began, and she swirled next to my chair, re-forming from lines of blue, red, and green light.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c39" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|“We will have a proper gym aboard as soon as I can freely adjust my structure,” Horizon assured us.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c2" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|"Horizon has limited attention," I responded, "and I want her holding the ship together."<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c9" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|“Shall we prepare for an attack, Captain?”<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c33" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:The Captain]]
[[Category:The Engineer]]
[[Category:The Knight]]
[[Category:The Pilot]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon characters]]
[[Category:Titled characters]]
